Asteroid City (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $28,153,025Details
International Box Office $25,800,765
Worldwide Box Office $53,953,790
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $325,926
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $794,710
Total $1,120,636
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The itinerary of a Junior Stargazer/Space Cadet convention (organized to bring together students and parents from across the country for fellowship and scholarly competition) is spectacularly disrupted by world-changing events.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$853,382 (3.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.11 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:52.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:6 opening theaters/1,901 max. theaters, 3.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $30,777,900

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 16th, 2023 (Limited) by Focus Features
June 23rd, 2023 (Expands Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: June 8th, 2023 (Wide) (Hungary)
June 9th, 2023 (Wide) (Finland)
June 9th, 2023 (Wide) (Latvia)
June 9th, 2023 (Wide) (Estonia)
June 9th, 2023 (Wide), released as Asteroidų miestas (Lithuania)
Video Release: July 11th, 2023 by Universal 1440 Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for brief graphic nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2769 (cert #54002) (Under Appeal), 2/8/2023)
PG-13 on appeal for brief graphic nudity, smoking and some suggestive material.
(Rating bulletin 2781 (cert #54002), 5/3/2023)

Source:Original Screenplay
